 <https://app.clickup-stg.com/333/v/dc/ad-1884057/ad-7569901>

Maximize human productivity





Release notes 4.02
Updates to Task Types in views, AI Notetaker, Gantt exports, and more!


This week's release adds the ability to manage Task Types in views, send your 
AI Notetaker to any meeting with just a link, set date ranges for Gantt view 
exports, and more.
 



View release notes
 <https://doc.clickup-stg.com/333/p/h/ad-7569901/e60979f978a9dfe>
 


Update Task Type Column in your views

 


You can now see and edit task types directly from List and Table views. Group 
by Task Type to understand what kind of work you're dealing with, from bugs to 
follow-ups, and let AI auto-classify tasks so your data stays clean.

 


Send AI Notetaker to any meeting
 


You can now send AI Notetaker to any call with just a link - useful for ad-hoc 
meetings that aren't on your calendar. You can also pin AI Notetaker to the top 
of your Workspace for quick access.

 


Export Gantt charts with date ranges

 


Choose a start and end date when exporting your Gantt view to PDF or PNG so 
you only share the slice of the timeline that matters, with the right level of 
detail for each audience.

 


Help us build the future of ClickUp by suggesting and voting 
<https://feedback.clickup.com/> on features to work on next.
 


© 2026 ClickUp / 350 Tenth Ave. Suite 500, San Diego, CA 92101 / Privacy Policy
 <https://clickup.com/terms/privacy> 






 <https://clickup.com/>



 <https://www.instagram.com/clickup/>

subject: Vibe Code Data Apps with Databricks - Live Thursday
body:
<https://luma.com/7iidm7dp>

 Vibe coding is changing how software gets built. Now it's coming to 
enterprise data.

This Thursday, we're going live to show you how to vibe code data apps in 
Replit and deploy them securely into Databricks. Your data never leaves your 
infrastructure.

Vibe Code Enterprise Data Apps with Replit + Databricks (LIVE)
Thursday, February 26 | 9 AM PT / 12 PM ET

What we're covering:
→ Intro to vibe coding for data teams
 → Live demo: Building a data app from scratch
→ Adding an AI assistant to talk to your data
→ Deploying securely into Databricks
→ Live Q&A

Whether you're a business leader looking to self-service your own data apps, 
or a data professional looking to streamline your workflow, this is a 
must-watch.

subject: Turn meeting recordings into work items and pages
body:
Atlassian Loom
 
Your meeting recordings are siloed
 
Use Loom to connect meeting recordings to Jira and Confluence

Hi Aimicro,
 
Your teams rely on Jira to manage projects and Confluence to share knowledge – but key decisions and updates from meetings often get trapped in a silo away from these tools.
 
Loom's notetaker removes the silo by recording your meetings and turning the captured conversation into action:
 
* Meeting recaps are instantly documented in Confluence
 
* Action items automatically become new work items in Jira
 
* Insights and key decisions from multiple meetings are consolidated into one view using Rovo
 
And Loom can record meetings in Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and Google Meet!
 
Click below to learn how to get started with setup.
 
Get started
>> https://support.atlassian.com/loom/docs/unlock-productivity-with-meeting-recordings/?utm_source=sfmc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-3A_EML-21372&jobid=107676126&subid=142988151&send_date=2/19/2026
 
The Loom team
 
---------------------------------------
 
Read in browser - https://view.e.atlassian.com/?vawpToken=DMCZPXEORWXUVMP3IVDZCAJBRE.10197
 
Privacy Policy - https://www.atlassian.com/legal/privacy-policy?utm_source=sfmc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-3A_EML-21372&jobid=107676126&subid=142988151&send_date=2/19/2026

Follow on X - https://x.com/Atlassian
 
Copyright 2026 Atlassian Pty Ltd. All rights reserved. We are located at 341 George Street, Sydney, NSW, 2000, Australia

subject: Invitation to Bid — Cable-Stayed Bridge Construction over River Chenab | TND-2026-00003
body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Punjab Roads & Infrastructure Authority (PRIA) cordially invites your
reputable firm to submit a detailed technical and financial proposal for
the Design-and-Build Construction of a Cable-Stayed Bridge spanning the
River Chenab at the Chiniot–Jhang Bypass, Punjab.

The proposed bridge has a main span of 320 metres with a total deck length
of 620 metres. It is a critical infrastructure link expected to reduce
commute time between Chiniot and Jhang by approximately 45 minutes and
serve an estimated 18,000 vehicles per day upon opening.

The complete Tender Package (Reference No: TND-2026-00003) is enclosed
herewith, comprising:
1. Instructions to Bidders
2. Scope of Work
3. Drawings Description
4. Technical Specifications
5. Bill of Quantities (BOQ)
6. Applicable Standards
7. Commercial Terms
Bid Submission Deadline: May 5, 2026 at 12:00 PM (PST).
Given the complexity of this project, only firms with documented experience
in long-span bridge construction (≥200 m main span) or cable-stayed bridge
design-build in the last ten years will be considered.
Yours sincerely,
Engr. Sajid Mehmood
Director Infrastructure Projects
Punjab Roads & Infrastructure Authority (PRIA)
Tel: +92-42-3711-2200
label: Analyzing Document...

subject: Invitation to Bid — High-Rise Commercial Tower (G+22) | TND-2026-00002
body:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Skyline Developments Pvt. Ltd. is pleased to invite your esteemed
organization to submit a competitive bid for the Construction of a
High-Rise Commercial Tower (G+22) situated at Clifton Block 5, Karachi,
Sindh.
This iconic mixed-use development will comprise ground-floor retail
outlets, office floors on levels 1–18, and premium corporate suites on
levels 19–22, totalling approximately 420,000 sq. ft. of built-up area. The
project demands the highest standards of structural engineering, facade
excellence, and MEP integration.
Enclosed herein is the complete Tender Package (Reference No:
TND-2026-00002), containing the following documents for your evaluation:
1. Instructions to Bidders — Submission timelines, required formats, and
evaluation criteria.
2. Scope of Work — Detailed civil, structural, facade, and finishing
requirements.
3. Drawings Description — Architectural and structural drawing register
with key annotations.
4. Technical Specifications — Material grades, concrete mix design, and
workmanship standards. 5. Bill of Quantities (BOQ) — Itemized quantities
for your financial offer.
6. Applicable Standards — ACI, ASTM, and local SBCA compliance
requirements.
7. Commercial Terms — Payment milestones, advance, retention, and LD
clauses.

Bid Submission Deadline: April 10, 2026 at 3:00 PM (PST). Bids submitted
after this deadline will not be entertained. All prices must be quoted in
Pakistani Rupees (PKR), inclusive of all taxes and levies.
Site familiarization visits have been arranged for March 18–19, 2026.
Attendance is strongly recommended.
We look forward to your participation and anticipate a long-term
collaborative partnership.
Warm regards,
Mr. Kamran Hussain
Project Manager — Procurement Division
Skyline Developments Pvt. Ltd.
Tel: +92-21-3456-7890
label: Analyzing Document...

subject: Invitation to Bid: Industrial Warehouse Construction - TND-2026-00001
body:
*Dear Sir/Madam,*

We are pleased to invite your company to submit a formal bid for the
*Construction
of an Industrial Warehouse (G+1)* located at Sundar Industrial Estate,
Lahore.

Attached to this email is the complete tender package (Reference No:
*TND-2026-00001*), which includes the following documentation for your
review:

   -

   *Instruction to Bidders:* Guidelines for the submission process and
   deadlines.
   -

   *Scope of Work & Technical Specifications:* Detailed requirements for
   civil, structural, and finishing works.
   -

   *Tender Drawings:* Architectural and structural layouts for the proposed
   facility.
   -

   *Bill of Quantities (BOQ):* Estimated quantities and itemized lists for
   financial quoting.
   -

   *Compliance & Commercial Terms:* Safety standards, payment schedules,
   and contractual obligations.

*Submission Requirements:* Kindly review the attached documents and provide
your most competitive technical and financial proposal by *March 15, 2026*.
Please ensure that all quotes are inclusive of applicable taxes and
strictly adhere to the provided specifications.

We look forward to receiving your proposal and potentially collaborating on
this project.

*Best Regards,*

*Abdullah Ali *Project Manager
label: Analyzing Document...

subject: [Reminder] [Action Required] Migrate to a newer Gemini model before Jun 1, 2026
body:
We're discontinuing Gemini 2.0 models on AIS.







Hello AiMicro,

We are writing to remind you that, as previously announced, we are  
discontinuing the following GA models on Gemini API and Google AI Studio  
(AIS). These models will be retired on June 1, 2026:


Gemini 2.0 Flash
Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite

We understand that making this change may require some planning and have  
provided additional information below to help you with the transition.

What you need to know

Key changes:

On June 1, 2026, we're discontinuing the following Gemini 2.0 models:


Model / Endpoint type Name / ID Availability Required action

Gemini 2.0 Flash gemini-2.0-flash
gemini-2.0-flash-001 Will be shut down on this date Migrate to a supported  
Gemini model (eg, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Flash Lite)

Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite gemini-2.0-flash-lite
gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001 Will be shut down on this date Migrate to a  
supported Gemini model (eg, 2.5 Flash Lite)


Impacted projects:

Your affected projects are listed below:


gen-lang-client-0672165792

We're here to help

If you have any questions or need help, please check our product  
documentation or visit the Gemini AI community.

Thanks for choosing Google AI Studio and Gemini API.




– The Gemini Team





© 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA
This email was sent to aimicrossrlsoft@gmail.com because you signed up to  
try the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.
label: Check for RFQ

subject: URGENT: Request for Quotation (RFQ) — Electrical & Plumbing Supplies for Project Alpha
body:
Dear Sales Team,

We are currently in the procurement phase for the 'Project Alpha'
infrastructure development and require an urgent quotation for the
following materials:

1. 25 Reels of 4mm Electrical Cable (Black)
2. 10 Units of 3-Phase Main Distribution Boards
3. 500 Meters of 25mm PPR Pipes for plumbing
4. 15 Industrial Water Valves (Stainless Steel)

Please provide your best competitive pricing and the earliest delivery
timeline for these items.

We look forward to receiving your quote by the end of the day.

Best Regards,
Procurement Manager
Construction Solutions Ltd.

link below:

hesitate to reach out.

REHAN

subject: Release Notes 4.01: Meet Super Agents
body:
ClickUp Email  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏ 
 ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏ 
 ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏ 
 ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏ 
 ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏  ﻿͏



 <https://clickup.com/>

Maximize human productivity



Release Notes 4.01: Super Agents Takeover
 


Super Agents are personalized AI teammates that understand your Workspace, 
execute work end-to-end, and keep you in the loop with real-time updates.
 



View release notes
 
<https://doc.clickup-stg.com/333/d/ad-1884057/2025-release-notes/ad-7306705/4-1-super-agents-takeover>
 


Human-like collaboration

 


Work with Super Agents like teammates: @Mention in comments, assign tasks, or 
direct message them. They understand your Workspace and execute tasks 
end-to-end, escalating issues, updates, and insights proactively.
 


500+ human skills, always on
 


Super Agents work like experienced teammates who take action on their own. 
They can manage email, scheduling, reporting, image generation, and so much 
more. Schedule their work or trigger them with any automation, and they'll work 
for you around the clock.
 


Infinite knowledge and memory

 


Super Agents combine unlimited knowledge with deep memory of your Workspace. 
They adapt to your preferences, remember past tasks, and store decisions & 
learnings in editable docs so context is never lost across conversations and 
tasks.
 


Custom AI teammates in minutes
 


Use the Builder to describe what's slowing you down, and you'll be guided step 
by step - defining what your agent does, how it works, what it knows, and what 
it shouldn't touch. Or select from prompts tailored to your Workspace activity.
 


Agent security, access, and permissions
 


Admins control exactly what Super Agents can access. By default, agents only 
see public Workspace data, with private context shared selectively. Every 
action is logged in real time for compliance, with granular admin controls for 
permissions, usage, and security enforcement.
 


Other Agent resources

 




Super Agents Keynote <https://clickup.wistia.com/medias/vmw4hwafkl>: Get the 
full story from our CEO, Zeb Evans, to learn how the future of work gets done.

Super Agents Overview <https://clickup.com/brain/agents>: Learn what makes 
Super Agents super and dive deep into their capabilities.

Get started with Super Agents 
<https://help.clickup.com/hc/en-us/categories/37728141474071-Super-Agents>: Get 
into the nitty-gritty of agent building with our comprehensive help articles

Super Agent Demos 
<https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLxRzBtka0l4ymmy02sZc-JGE2952VXA1j>: 
Personal assistant, Project manager, Standup manager, and more!

Super Agent Pricing <https://clickup.com/brain/pricing>: Everything you need 
to know about Super Credits, andmore 
<https://help.clickup.com/hc/en-us/articles/34741383911959-Purchase-or-track-ClickUp-AI-Super-Credits>
.
 


© 2026 ClickUp / 350 Tenth Ave. Suite 500, San Diego, CA 92101 / Privacy Policy
 <https://clickup.com/terms/privacy> 






 <https://clickup.com/>



 <https://www.instagram.com/clickup/>

 <https://x.com/clickup>

 <https://www.tiktok.com/@clickup>

 <https://www.linkedin.com/company/12949663>

 <https://www.youtube.com/@ClickUpProductivity>

 <https://www.facebook.com/clickupprojectmanagement/>

subject: Share your app online & choose your web address
body:
Put Your App on the Web with Replit


 Ready to share your creation with the world? Here's how to get your app 
online and set up your custom web address.


 <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rGYdyb58wJY> 

Hosting made simple:


 * Test thoroughly in your preview
 * Click "Run" from your project dashboard
 * Check everything works before pressing deploy and sharing your link 

Choose your web address


 * Watch: adding your own web address 
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rGYdyb58wJY>: Easy walkthrough of web address 
setup
 * Free option: Use a replit.app address (yourapp.replit.app)
 * Custom address: Connect your own domain for a professional loo 

After going live:


 * Share your link on social media to attract users
 * Track how visitors use your app
 * Create a way to collect user feedback
 * Keep an eye on how your app is performing  

Congratulations on reaching this milestone! Your app is now accessible to 
anyone with an internet connection.

Happy Sharing!
The Replit Team
   

 

 <https://twitter.com/Replit>  <https://www.linkedin.com/company/repl-it> 
<https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoJjdR6-7AMu9fDitb6nVw> 
<https://www.instagram.com/repl.it/?hl=en>

Sent by Replit
1001 E Hillsdale Blvd, Suite 400, Foster City, CA 94404 

Unsubscribe here 
<https://links.replit.com/s/u/2NrsiUe2_0Ctt0xT-29Oawu2hxcuTBIlPMWFiq7BhyYBksV-_sL4_PAy2qvQrr6XGQpMim0yTzw_VDGutZimuXattug2DpShfRonh6wfujIW4kqFOegZ_Y9oaeyPp4u3aklBRrrRXxn5hH_C7NvL75InLxRmGqK1ZiYS7-Ob7Vm2YH9KURBcCn5aiTISEvH8-TowEyUO7sxyQgV_/OFOeQfw_WFgIKHK_wXf0vNpc4lY-XQsN/17>

subject: Tell us about your Atlassian experience!
body:
Atlassian
Tell us what you think
 
Your feedback directly shapes what we do
 

Hi,
 
As a valued Atlassian user, your opinion matters! We'd love to hear your thoughts about your experience with us and our apps.
 
Share your thoughts in a quick 7 to 10‑minute survey to help us improve your experience.

subject: Loom AI: what you need to know
body:
Atlassian Loom
 
Help your team move faster with Loom AI
 
Learn how to activate it and review admin controls

Hi Aimicro,
 
Loom AI helps your teams move faster by:
 
* Auto‑generating video titles, chapters, summaries, and tasks
 
* Turning recordings into written documentation in Confluence
 
* Editing videos as easily as text – remove filler words and trim clips in seconds
 
* Speeding up incident response by turning bug recordings into Jira work items with reproduction steps
 
Take a moment to review your settings to ensure Loom AI is enabled – and help your team get the most out of Loom!
 
Review settings
>> https://www.loom.com/settings/workspace?utm_source=sfmc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-2A_EML-21372&jobid=107676125&subid=142988151&send_date=2/15/2026#loom-ai
 
The Loom team
 
---------------------------------------

subject: Get Your App Ready for Real Users
body:
Get Your App Ready for Real Users


 Take your project from prototype to production with these essential 
integrations and features.


 <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=joHMyy-BqPA>  

Critical app components:
 

Store & manage data


 * Add a database to your app <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zbyRuoPNIc8>: 
Learn how to persistently store user data and application state 

Integrate any API


 * Add secrets to your projects <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qE_2Z8ReyWI>: 
how to securely add API keys to connect to other software you want 

Secure user access


 * Implement Replit Auth <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=joHMyy-BqPA>: Add 
user authentication in minutes without complex setup 

Pre-launch checklist:


 * Test your database connections with sample data
 * Verify authentication flows for different user types
 * Implement proper error handling for API failures
 * Set up monitoring to track usage and performance
 * Create a simple onboarding process for new users  

These integrations will transform your project into a robust application 
that's ready for real-world users.

Looking forward to seeing what you launch!
The Replit Team
   

 

 <https://twitter.com/Replit> <https://www.linkedin.com/company/repl-it> 
<https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoJjdR6-7AMu9fDitb6nVw>  
<https://www.instagram.com/repl.it/?hl=en>

Sent by Replit
1001 E Hillsdale Blvd, Suite 400, Foster City, CA 94404 

Unsubscribe here 
<https://links.replit.com/s/u/VgGddJ64kN8yO8yWR8Blk-6oGWXNrBQotdP00AyfMy7JXNlTZS_RgfOdAN7X3epU0tA_u9zS8H4RbgiLGjaOZyjAFS797PWApO6ccs2ePoVIXa3yCc4-WZbN4mU2EdxB9Vg_YlaLT3_iEwm0DmbFu7RVA2WZH4WiNBt11auPlwM_fyuesnoABs62PUlJQUStlvQJXDraH2jGivrm/GWt6jtJdfwUkGkPZS1BeDZKSaWmWiPl8/17>
